Phase 1: Model Review & Documentation.description: Understand existing model structure, identify gaps vs industry standards (SOA, IA, ERM), document assumptions and deviations
tasks: Audit current model code and architecture
Document all model assumptions and parameters
Identify deviations from SOA stochastic modeling standards
Review existing validation and testing framework
Create initial assumptions document with SOA compliance notes
Map model components to IA governance requirements
in_progress: Audit current model code and architecture
Phase 1: Model Review & Documentation.next: Document all model assumptions and parameters

Phase 2: Industry Standards Alignment.description: Align stochastic process definitions with SOA standards, implement required risk metrics, add governance framework compliance
tasks: Implement SOA stochastic process documentation standards
Add Value at Risk (VaR) and Expected Shortfall (ES) metrics
Update parameter calibration methodology documentation
Implement governance and audit trail framework
Add scenario stress testing framework
Update model validation requirements per IA standards

Phase 3: Model Validation & Testing.description: Implement comprehensive validation suite including unit tests, integration tests, and scenario analysis
tasks: Create unit tests for core model components
Implement integration testing across modules
Build stress testing and scenario analysis framework
Create backtesting framework and validation reports
Document validation methodology per IA requirements
Implement automated model health checks

Phase 4: Calibration & Backtesting.description: Calibrate model parameters to historical data, validate against backtesting, perform sensitivity analysis
tasks: Implement parameter calibration methodology
Calibrate stochastic process parameters to historical data
Create backtesting dataset and framework
Generate backtesting reports with tail loss analysis
Perform sensitivity analysis on key parameters
Document model stability and limitations

Phase 5: Documentation & Delivery.description: Final documentation, model card, risk disclosures, and deployment readiness
tasks: Create comprehensive model documentation
Develop model risk card with limitations and known issues
Write model usage guide and assumptions document
Create deployment readiness checklist
Final validation report and sign-off
Archive model version and release notes

technical_notes.git_strategy: commit to main after each task
